# 💡 C79 · Recursive Proof Composition (Shared Frontier)
**concept** · shared · knowledge

The shared technical frontier: recursive proof composition across providers under heterogeneous trust at runtime (Bakhta §6 = PVM's hardest open item). Active (45% · V6 Run 5 IVC adjacency).
